ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the football team */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year of the season */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Average attendance for home matches */,
  "city" TEXT /* The city where the team is based */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* The year the team was founded */,
  "manager" TEXT /* The current manager of the team */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* The player's date of birth */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* The player's nationality */,
  "height" REAL /* The player's height in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* The player's weight in kilograms */,
  "foot" TEXT /* The player's preferred foot */,
  "shirt_number" INTEGER /* The player's shirt number */,
  "contract_start" TEXT /* The start date of the player's contract */,
  "contract_end" TEXT /* The end date of the player's contract */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the player in the season */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the player in the season */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total yellow cards received by the player in the season */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Total red cards received by the player in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goalkeepers" (
  "goalkeeper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goalkeeper */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who is a goalkeeper */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the goalkeeper belongs to */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets kept by the goalkeeper in the season */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the goalkeeper in the season */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Total saves made by the goalkeeper in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goalkeeper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goalkeepers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goalkeepers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "home_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the home team */,
  "away_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the away team */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stadium where the match was played */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the referee who officiated the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* The attendance for the match */,
  "home_team_goals_1st_half" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the home team in the first half */,
  "away_team_goals_1st_half" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the away team in the first half */,
  "home_team_goals_2nd_half" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the home team in the second half */,
  "away_team_goals_2nd_half" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the away team in the second half */,
  "home_team_yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the home team */,
  "away_team_yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the away team */,
  "home_team_red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the home team */,
  "away_team_red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* The number of teams participating in the season */,
  "top_scorer" TEXT /* The name of the top scorer of the season */,
  "top_scorer_goals" INTEGER /* The number of goals scored by the top scorer */,
  "top_assister" TEXT /* The name of the top assister of the season */,
  "top_assister_assists" INTEGER /* The number of assists made by the top assister */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's standing */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Number of goals conceded by the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the team */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference for the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team in the season */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team in the season */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets kept by the team in the season */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total yellow cards received by the team in the season */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Total red cards received by the team in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scorers" (
  "scorer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's top scorer */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who is the top scorer */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the top scorer belongs to */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the top scorer */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the top scorer in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scorer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scorers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scorers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scorers_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach belongs to */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date as coach for the team */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date as coach for the team */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* The coach's nationality */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* The coach's date of birth */,
  "former_teams" TEXT /* A list of teams the coach has previously managed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team that plays at the venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "stadium_location" TEXT /* The location of the stadium (city, country) */,
  "stadium_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the stadium */,
  "stadium_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venues_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "matches_officiated" INTEGER /* Number of matches officiated by the referee */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* The referee's nationality */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* The referee's date of birth */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience as a referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the injured player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the injured player belongs to */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Date the player recovered from the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* The type of injury */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the injury */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the injury */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* The treatment received for the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transferred player */,
  "from_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player transferred from */,
  "to_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player transferred to */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date the transfer occurred */,
  "transfer_fee" REAL /* Transfer fee for the player */,
  "transfer_reason" TEXT /* The reason for the transfer */,
  "transfer_type" TEXT /* The type of transfer */,
  "loan_end_date" TEXT /* If the transfer is a loan, the end date of the loan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_from_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_to_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsorships" (
  "sponsorship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsorship */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sponsored team */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "sponsorship_fee" REAL /* Sponsorship fee */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the sponsorship */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the sponsorship */,
  "sponsorship_type" TEXT /* The type of sponsorship */,
  "sponsorship_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the sponsor's logo */,
  "sponsorship_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the sponsorship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsorship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsorships_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
